title: Special-case deterministic root rounds in vector path
methodology: Added a root-round fast path to the vector kernel. On rounds where every lane is provably at idx 0, it reuses a cached broadcast of the root node, skips index loads and node gathers, and drops the wrap check from the post-hash update.
motivation: Building on exp-018 pipeline-next-batch-prefetch-under-vecto and exp-017 cache-root-node-for-deterministic-root-r, the brief explicitly suggested combining successful elements from current best experiments.
